advice.label: Advice
advice.description: Recommended actions that can improve performance tooling observability.

kernel_config.label: Kernel configuration
kernel_config.description: Kernel configuration settings collected when requested.

report.collected_time.label: Collected
report.collected_time.description: Timestamp when ASCT collected the system information.

report.asct_ver.label: ASCT version
report.asct_ver.description: Version of ASCT used to collect the report.

report.run_as_root.label: Running as root
report.run_as_root.description: Whether ASCT was run with root privileges.

sys_hw.arch.label: Architecture
sys_hw.arch.description: Processor architecture reported by the operating system.

sys_hw.n_cpus.label: CPUs
sys_hw.n_cpus.description: Number of logical CPUs visible to the operating system.

sys_hw.cpu_type.label: CPU types
sys_hw.cpu_type.description: CPU type summary grouped by detected CPU implementation.

sys_hw.cpu_features.label: CPU features
sys_hw.cpu_features.description: CPU feature flags reported by the operating system.

sys_hw.cache_info.label: Cache info
sys_hw.cache_info.description: Summary of detected CPU cache configuration.

sys_hw.cache_size_dict.label: Cache sizes
sys_hw.cache_size_dict.description: Detected data cache sizes by cache level.

sys_hw.caches.label: Caches
sys_hw.caches.description: Detected cache instances grouped by cache description.

sys_hw.atomics.label: Atomic operations
sys_hw.atomics.description: Whether the system supports atomic operations.

sys_hw.interconnect.label: Interconnect
sys_hw.interconnect.description: Detected system interconnect type and count.

sys_hw.n_numa_nodes.label: NUMA nodes
sys_hw.n_numa_nodes.description: Number of NUMA nodes visible to the operating system.

sys_hw.numa_nodes.label: NUMA node details
sys_hw.numa_nodes.description: Memory size and CPU list for each NUMA node.

sys_hw.numa_kern_cfg.label: NUMA kernel configuration
sys_hw.numa_kern_cfg.description: Whether kernel NUMA support is configured.

sys_hw.sockets.label: Sockets
sys_hw.sockets.description: Number of physical CPU packages detected.

sys_info.product_name.label: Product Name
sys_info.product_name.description: System product name reported by DMI.

sys_info.serial.label: Serial
sys_info.serial.description: System serial number reported by DMI.

bios_info.release_date.label: Release Date
bios_info.release_date.description: BIOS release date reported by DMI.

memory.total_size.label: System memory
memory.total_size.description: Total physical memory reported by the operating system.

memory.n_channels.label: # of channels
memory.n_channels.description: Number of memory channels inferred from DMI.

memory.part_number.label: Part Number
memory.part_number.description: Memory part number reported by DMI.

memory.speed.label: Speed
memory.speed.description: Configured memory speed reported by DMI.

memory.data_width.label: Data Width
memory.data_width.description: Memory data width reported by DMI.

memory.peak_theoretical_bw.label: Peak bandwidth
memory.peak_theoretical_bw.description: Theoretical peak memory bandwidth calculated from DMI memory width, speed, and channel count.

kern_cfg.ver.label: Kernel
kern_cfg.ver.description: Kernel version reported by the operating system.

kern_cfg.cfg_file.label: Config
kern_cfg.cfg_file.description: Kernel configuration file used for feature checks.

kern_cfg.uses_atomics.label: Uses atomics
kern_cfg.uses_atomics.description: Whether the kernel is configured to use atomic operations.

kern_cfg.kpti.label: KPTI enforced
kern_cfg.kpti.description: Whether kernel page table isolation is enforced.

perf_feats.n_counters.label: perf counters
perf_feats.n_counters.description: Number of available hardware performance counters.

perf_feats.perf_hw_trace.label: perf HW trace
perf_feats.perf_hw_trace.description: Hardware trace support available through perf.

perf_feats.paranoid.label: perf paranoid
perf_feats.paranoid.description: Value of the kernel perf_event_paranoid setting.

perf_feats.kptr_restrict.label: kptr_restrict
perf_feats.kptr_restrict.description: Value of the kernel kptr_restrict setting.

perf_feats.userspace_access.label: perf in userspace
perf_feats.userspace_access.description: Whether userspace access to performance counters is enabled.

perf_feats.interconnect.label: interconnect perf
perf_feats.interconnect.description: Whether interconnect performance monitoring is available.

perf_feats.bpf.bpf.label: kernel configured for BPF
perf_feats.bpf.bpf.description: Whether the kernel is configured for BPF.

advice.label: Advice
advice.description: Recommended actions that can improve performance tooling observability.

vulnerabilities.label: Vulnerabilities
vulnerabilities.description: CPU vulnerability information reported by the operating system.

kernel_config.label: Kernel configuration
kernel_config.description: Kernel configuration settings collected when requested.
